name: Thien Le
about: I am a Ph.D. student at UNIST under Professor Sungil Kim. My research integrates Lean Thinking, Six Sigma and Data Architecture to design decentralized, scalable, value-driven data ecosystems — bridging operational excellence with distributed data ownership to improve data quality and decision-making.
interests: Business Intelligence strategy & KPI-driven performance management
Advanced analytics for financial, operational & risk decisions
Data modeling & ML for data-driven decision-making

milestones.title: B.S. in Management Information Systems
milestones.note: University of Economics and Law, VNUHCM
